source_pr.title: plan: covert max/min to Limit + Sort operators
source_pr.body:
For SQL like `select max(c) from t;`, we could optimize it to `select c from t order by c desc limit 1;`.
For SQL like `select min(c) from t;`, we could optimize it to `select c from t order by c limit 1;`.

fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: files: executor/index_lookup_join.go, executor/join.go, plan/aggregation_eliminate.go, plan/expression_rewriter.go, plan/logical_plan_builder.go, plan/logical_plan_test.go, plan/optimizer.go, plan/physical_plans.go, plan/resolve_indices.go, plan/topn_push_down.go
